name: Sekolah Victory Plus

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Citra Niaga Raya Blok AO 1-14, Perumahan Kemang Pratama, Bekasi 17116, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Affordable British curriculum in Bekasi. Practical choice for East Jakarta families wanting international standards at lower fees.
paragraphs: Affordable British curriculum in Bekasi. Practical choice for East Jakarta families wanting international standards at lower fees.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2K – US$5K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Kemang Pratama campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Early years centre.

metaDescription: Sekolah Victory Plus (South Jakarta). Affordable British curriculum in Bekasi. Practical choice for East Jakarta families wanting international standards at lower fees.…
